## ⛔ READ-ONLY CONSTRAINT
The AIOS directory (/home/thorsten/dev/AIOS) is READ-ONLY infrastructure.

NEVER modify, create, or delete files inside AIOS. This includes:
- patterns/ — use .aios/patterns/ for project-local overrides instead
- personas/ — use .aios/context.yaml to configure active personas
- src/ — never touch AIOS source code from a project context
- docs/ — reference only

If a pattern doesn't fit this project → override it in .aios/patterns/
If AIOS has a bug → inform the user, do not attempt to fix it

## Pattern Resolution Order
1. .aios/patterns/<name>/system.md  (project override, wins)
2. /home/thorsten/dev/AIOS/patterns/<name>/system.md  (default, fallback)

To override a pattern:
  mkdir -p .aios/patterns/<pattern-name>
  cp /home/thorsten/dev/AIOS/patterns/<pattern-name>/system.md .aios/patterns/<pattern-name>/
  # Edit the local copy — AIOS will use it instead of the default

## Commands
  aios init                  # re-run wizard
  aios init --refresh        # regenerate from context.yaml
  aios "task description"    # dynamic routing
  aios run <pattern>         # direct pattern execution
  aios plan "task"           # show execution plan without running
  aios patterns list         # list available patterns
